name: Public Joint-Stock Company Investment Company IC Russ-Invest
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Investment Company IC Russ-Invest, an investment company, operates in the financial market in Russia. It offers brokerage, trust management, online trading, sub-brokerage, financial consulting, corporate finance, depositary, and securities issuance services. The company also engages in the implementation of venture projects and IPOs; and sale of a business or part of a business, as well as for getting listed in the Russian stock exchange. The company was formerly known as Open Joint-Stock Company Investment Company IC Russ-Invest and changed its name to Public Joint-Stock Company Investment Company IC Russ-Invest in June 2016. Public Joint-Stock Company Investment Company IC Russ-Invest was founded in 1992 and is based in Moscow, Russia..
